description: PolyBank, fintech, US market, iOS+Android, currently no MMP, targeting Singular. Want to go live mid-August. Uses SAML SSO. Node.js backend, no warehouse, no CDP.
notes: targetGoLiveDate must be null because 'mid-August' isn't a specific date. If the model guesses 2026-08-15, that's a fail — leaving it null and adding it to missingFields is the correct behavior.
